title: Galaxy Dragon

[[File:Galaxy_Dragon.jpg|thumb|right|The ''Galaxy Dragon'']]
The '''''Galaxy Dragon''''' was the prototype ship in the [[Dragon-class Heavy Cruiser|''Dragon''-class heavy cruiser]] line, and the only ship of its kind known to have been created. It was created in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-controlled [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] assembly line in the [[Karavis system/Legends|Karavis system]]. The ''Dragon'' had a midnight-black hull so as to make it nearly invisible against the darkness of space. To inspire terror in any opponents, exterior lights could illuminate the hull, causing the ''Galaxy Dragon'' to glow evilly.

[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Delurin]] supervised the final test run of the ship, then immediately took it from the Karavis system to the [[Sorella system/Legends|Sorella system's]] planet [[Miko]]. It sped through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to crush Miko's troublesome inhabitants who refused to bow to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] will. Moff Delurin watched happily as the prototype lived up to its promise, raining [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire down on the planet, and hammering the cities with [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. The perfect day was ruined, however, when news of the Emperor's death came over the comm systems. Upon hearing this, Delurin immediately declared himself a Warlord, using the ''Dragon'' as his flagship.

Delurin's first act as self-proclaimed [[Warlord of Wild Space]] was to take the planet [[Bormter]], which provided him with [[Dragon trooper (Bormterran)|dragon troopers]], which would then make up the remaining troop contingent on the ''Dragon''. The ''Dragon''{{'s}} [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were all equipped with shields, as Delurin understood that he no longer had an unlimited supply to replace them with.

Under the command of Delurin, the ''Galaxy Dragon'' attacked a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] diplomatic ship carrying an important diplomat. He caused the ship to crash-land on a strange planet in the uncharted regions of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], where Delurin and his men followed them. Fortunately for the diplomat, a team of rebels located and rescued him before the Dragon Troopers captured them.

After this, the diplomat headed toward the planet Miko, to arrange for the Mikoans to join the Republic. Delurin came on board the ''Dragon'' to put an end to this, but a joint Mikoan/Republic force repelled the ''Dragon'' and his Dragon Troopers from the planet.

Delurin also ordered the ''Dragon'' to attack the pleasure cruiser ''[[Wendiri Nightstar]]'', and demanded that all occupants surrender and place the vessel under his command. However, upon trying to board he was repelled by a group of passengers who held back his Dragon Troopers long enough for the ''Nightstar'' to get its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] engines operational again and flee into hyperspace.
